# Sample Claude Article

This is a sample Claude article used to validate markdown ingestion. It contains
enough repeated text to produce multiple overlapping chunks when the chunk size
is small during tests. The loader should preserve the metadata, company, and
source file values.

The same sentence is repeated many times so token-window splitting can be
verified deterministically. The same sentence is repeated many times so
token-window splitting can be verified deterministically. The same sentence is
repeated many times so token-window splitting can be verified deterministically.
